name: Minestrone
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the white beans overnight.
2. Cook the soaked beans separately.
3. Wash and trim the zucchini; dice it.
4. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and cook until wilted and pale gold, stirring occasionally for about 5 minutes.
5. Add carrots and stir frequently, cooking for another 3 minutes.
6. Add celery and continue stirring, cooking for another 3 minutes.
7. Stir in green beans and cook for 3 minutes.
8. Add zucchini and stir all ingredients together. Cook for a few more minutes until the vegetables start to soften.
9. Add shredded cabbage and cook for an additional 6 minutes.
10. Stir in tomatoes and cook for 5 minutes.
11. Pour in beef broth, salt, pepper, and oregano.
12. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 2.5 hours until vegetables are tender.
13. Add the cooked white beans to the pot and stir gently. Cook for an additional 15 minutes.
14. Finally, add pasta shells and cook for another 20 to 30 minutes until the pasta is fully cooked and the soup has thickened.
